channel.title: Posts on My Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My Personal Website

item.title: AI Engineering Links
item.description:
LLM-Driven Development

Overview

  • https://utkarshkanwat.com/writing/betting-against-agents/
  • https://decodingml.substack.com/p/stop-building-ai-agents

LLM-Based Workflows

  • https://crawshaw.io/blog/programming-with-agents
  • https://harper.blog/2025/02/16/my-llm-codegen-workflow-atm/
  • https://sketch.dev/blog/programming-with-llms

Building LLM Agents

  • https://ampcode.com/how-to-build-an-agent
  • https://ampcode.com/agents-for-the-agent
  • https://sketch.dev/blog/agent-loop
  • https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/building-effective-agents

Socials

  • https://x.com/headinthebox
  • https://x.com/anaisbetts

Awesome Lists

  • https://github.com/papers-we-love/papers-we-love

item.title: Repetition
item.description:
There are countless ways of practicing meditation, and most involve fixing your attention on some physical or mental object and bringing your attention back to it, over and over again. In some sense, any way of engaging one’s attention - by mental or physical means - repetitively and over a sustained period can be considered a kind of meditation.

If you meditate with enough duration and intensity, stuff starts to happen. You might find yourself in a deep, serene, or trancelike state of mind. You might find that it opens up a deep sense of effortlessness or intuition. The benefits can be profound.
